TSLA: YieldMax Short TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.1943. The YieldMax Short TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (TSLY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.1943 per share. This distribution is payable on June 07, 2024, to shareholders of record as of May 31, 2024, with an ex-dividend date of May 31, 2024.

REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2728. The REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF (TSLY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.2728 per share for its shareholders. The ex-dividend date is set for May 30, 2026, with the payment date on June 03, 2026. This distribution highlights the ETF's strategy to provide income to investors.

REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2728. The REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF (TSLY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.2728 per share for the week of May 25 to May 31, 2026. This distribution will be payable on June 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 3, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of June 2, 2026. The distribution amount remains unchanged from the previous week.

SunCar Technology Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results. SunCar Technology Group Inc. reported its first quarter 2026 financial results, achieving its third consecutive quarter of profitability with a net income of $1.6 million, an increase from a net loss in the prior year. The company witnessed a 28% year-over-year revenue growth, reaching $131.2 million, driven by a significant 43% growth in EV insurance premiums and strong performance in auto eInsurance and technology services. SunCar also expanded its partnerships with major companies like Tesla, Xiaomi, and various banks and insurance providers, leveraging AI technology for enhanced services and anticipating approximately $600 million in revenue for the full year 2026.

Why Tesla’s Lens Cleaning Patent Matters For Optimus, Robotaxi - Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA). Tesla recently received a patent for a "Lens Cleaning System" designed for its robotaxis and Optimus humanoid robot. This system, which uses fluid and wipers, aims to keep cameras clean without human intervention, addressing debris issues for robotaxis and maintaining the Optimus's vision. The patent is crucial as Tesla shifts its focus towards robotics, AI, and self-driving technology, with Elon Musk believing these areas will drive the company's future valuation significantly.

Jefferies (JEF) issues autocallable buffered leveraged notes linked to worst-performing tech trio. Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has priced an offering of $1.185 million in Senior Autocallable Buffered Leveraged Notes. These notes, maturing on May 28, 2031, are linked to the performance of Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL), Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), and Tesla, Inc. (TSLA), specifically to the worst-performing of the trio. The notes offer a 200% participation rate on upside at maturity if the worst-performing underlying appreciates, with potential for early call on August 24, 2026, and significant principal loss risk if the worst-performing underlying declines below its threshold value.

Tesla's long-awaited Roadster will be built in Texas, executives say. Tesla executives have confirmed that the long-awaited Roadster, dubbed an "all-electric supercar," will be built at Gigafactory Texas, signaling further investment in the Austin-area plant. The vehicle is expected to achieve 0-60 mph in 1.9 seconds, a top speed of 250 mph, and a 620-mile range. This marks the return of the Roadster, with its second generation having faced several production delays since its initial prototype in 2006.

Tesla is ready to resurrect its long-awaited Roadster at Gigafactory Texas, execs say. Tesla executives have confirmed that the next-generation Roadster, an all-electric supercar, will be produced at Gigafactory Texas. Chief Designer Franz von Holzhausen and engineering Vice President Lars Moravy stated that fans can expect developments in the coming months, signaling further investment in the Austin factory. This move adds a high-performance vehicle to the facility's current production of the Cybertruck, Model Y, and Cybercab, showcasing Tesla's continued expansion in Texas.

EV insurance up 42.5% at SunCar as Tesla expands use, banks add chauffeur deals. SunCar Technology (NASDAQ: SDA) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, achieving its third consecutive profitable quarter with revenue up 28% year-over-year to $131.2 million and net income of $1.6 million. The company saw significant growth in EV insurance premiums, surging 42.5% to $514.4 million, driven by expanded partnerships with major EV makers like Tesla and Xiaomi. SunCar also secured substantial multi-year contracts with prominent banks such as AgBank and Minsheng Bank for chauffeur and transportation services, projecting full-year 2026 revenue of approximately $600 million.
TGT: Geode Capital Management LLC Increases Holdings in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX. Geode Capital Management LLC has increased its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) by 2.6%, adding 673,690 shares to hold a total of 27.0 million shares worth approximately $4.13 billion. This increase follows TJX's strong quarterly performance, where EPS of $1.19 and revenue of $14.32 billion both exceeded estimates, with sales growing 9.2% year-over-year. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.48 per share, and analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $174.58.

Allstate Corp Purchases 17,607 Shares of Target Corporation $TGT. Allstate Corp increased its stake in Target Corporation (TGT) by 105.7% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 17,607 shares, bringing their total to 34,263 shares valued at $3.349 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Target, while a company insider, CAO Matthew A. Liegel, sold 2,053 shares. Target recently reported strong Q1 earnings, topping analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.14 per share.

Big-Box Retailers Defying the Cautious Consumer Backdrop. Big-box mass-market retailers are successfully navigating a cautious consumer environment due to their value positioning and operational scale. The article highlights three US-listed mass-market retail companies and includes details about Walmart's advertising business, Dollar General's focus on rural consumers, and Target's status as a dividend aristocrat. The content requires logging in to read the full analysis.

Costco Q3 Preview: Stock Could Hit $1,200 Or Fall To $960, Market Expert Says 'Prudent To Wait This One Out'. Costco is expected to report Q3 revenue of $69.42 billion and EPS of $4.92, with an Oppenheimer analyst raising the price target to $1,160 due to strong value proposition and potential for a special dividend or stock split. However, a market expert advises caution given the stock's technical levels, suggesting it could hit $1,200 on an optimistic report or fall to $960 on a weak one. Strong performance from peers BJ's Wholesale and Sam's Club, along with increased visitor traffic to Costco gas stations due to higher gas prices, indicate a potentially strong quarter for Costco.

Target’s focus is on the supply chain. Target has brought in former Walmart executive Jeff England as its new executive vice president and chief global supply chain and logistics officer, signaling a significant shift in its approach to tackling long-standing supply chain challenges. This move is part of Target's broader turnaround strategy, which includes a $6 billion capital expenditure with a focus on improving supply chain capabilities and store operations. The company aims to leverage England's operational expertise from Walmart to enhance key areas like fulfillment, inventory visibility, and profitability.
SBUX: Barclays (DJP) offers $4.398M auto‑callable notes with 29% contingent coupon. Barclays Bank PLC has priced $4.398 million in market-linked, auto-callable notes due May 25, 2029, offering a 29.00% per annum contingent coupon. These notes are linked to the performance of Intel (INTC), Micron (MU), and Starbucks (SBUX) and include contingent downside principal at risk. The securities can be automatically called early and carry risks such as credit exposure to Barclays and potential principal loss if underlying stocks fall below their thresholds.

Starbucks fiasco puts Shinsegae under financial strain. A marketing blunder by Starbucks Korea, perceived as mocking South Korea's democracy movements, is creating significant financial strain for its controlling conglomerate, Shinsegae Group. The controversy could lead to a possible buyback of Starbucks Korea by its Seattle-based parent, resulting in a 640 billion won loss for Emart, a Shinsegae affiliate. Additionally, planned refunds for prepaid gift cards and reduced sales due to public outrage pose further financial challenges for the highly profitable coffee chain.
DIS: 14,418 Shares in The Walt Disney Company $DIS Acquired by Constant Guidance Financial LLC. Constant Guidance Financial LLC has acquired 14,418 shares of The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) totaling approximately $1.64 million, making it their 18th largest holding. Institutional ownership in Disney remains strong, with several firms increasing stakes, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $134.47. The company recently surpassed earnings and revenue estimates.

Geode Capital Management LLC Acquires 1,361,888 Shares of The Walt Disney Company $DIS. Geode Capital Management LLC increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 3.5% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 1,361,888 shares to bring its total holdings to over 40.5 million shares valued at approximately $4.6 billion. Disney recently reported better-than-expected quarterly results with an EPS of $1.57 and revenue of $25.17 billion, up 6.5% year-over-year. Wall Street analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for DIS with an average price target of $134.47, following several upgrades and increased price targets.

Papa Johns to open Pizza Planet pop-ups in 4 cities for ‘Toy Story 5’. Papa Johns is launching Pizza Planet-themed pop-ups in London, Seoul, Madrid, and Los Angeles to celebrate the upcoming release of Disney and Pixar’s “Toy Story 5.” These temporary locations will feature retro décor, arcade elements, and limited-time menu items inspired by the movie, such as specialty pizzas. For fans outside these cities, a global "Toy Story 5" menu and an in-app game for Papa Rewards members will also be available.

Papa Johns to open Pizza Planet pop-ups in LA for ‘Toy Story 5’. Papa Johns is launching "Pizza Planet" pop-up shops in Los Angeles, London, Seoul, and Madrid next month to coincide with the release of Disney Pixar's "Toy Story 5." These retro-inspired pizza arcades will offer three new Toy Story-themed pizzas, exclusive merchandise, and surprise giveaways. The Los Angeles pop-up will be open for one day only on June 12th, while the themed pizzas will also be available nationwide and in 42 international locations from June 1st to July 19th for those unable to visit the pop-ups.

Papa Johns Teams Up with Disney and Pixar for the Release of Toy Story 5. Papa Johns has announced a global collaboration with Disney and Pixar for the release of Toy Story 5, introducing new Toy Story 5 personal pizzas and limited-edition collectibles. This marks the franchise's first partnership with a pizza brand for a film release, aiming to connect with fans through quality ingredients and the beloved Toy Story characters. The campaign includes three themed pizzas, collectibles, an in-app game, and a custom-animated spot by Pixar.

Papa Johns Bringing Pizza Planet to Life With Immersive ‘Toy Story 5’ Pop-Up Experiences. Papa Johns is collaborating with Disney and Pixar to launch immersive "Pizza Planet" pop-up experiences in anticipation of the *Toy Story 5* film release. These limited-time pop-ups, inspired by the iconic movie location, will offer themed decor, merchandise, games, and exclusive menu items in cities like Los Angeles, London, Seoul, and Madrid. Additionally, Papa Johns will offer the *Toy Story 5*-themed menu items globally and introduce an in-app game for Papa Rewards members.
